summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing for new Siskamling features (4-tab nav, role-based chat, BMKG earthquakes, members listing, disaster reports, live GPS, invite friend). Backend: 33/33 pytest tests PASS including 15 new tests covering role-based room access (warga=1, koord_rw=2, koord_kel=3), 403 enforcement on unauthorized rooms, BMKG real-API integration (returns Magnitude/Wilayah keys, BMKG API was reachable during tests), /api/users/members listing same-RW members with is_me flag, /api/bencana/status returning 6 disaster types (gempa/tsunami/gunung/longsor/banjir/angin), disaster report create + read persistence, and emergency alert returning live location. Frontend (mobile 390x844): Verified end-to-end via UI - register via API + login via UI, all 4 tabs (Darurat/Cuaca/Bencana/Chat) render and are tappable. Koord_kel user sees 3 chat rooms in DOM (room-rw, room-koord_rw, room-koord_kel); warga user sees only 1 (room-rw, others False). Chat send/receive works (POST/GET via API, message renders in DOM with sender role badge). Members sub-tab shows registered users incl. invite-friend-button. Bencana page shows overall-status-badge, BMKG earthquake card (real data), all 6 bencana-status-{type} grid items, 2 OpenStreetMap iframes, report modal opens with description input + submit button. Cuaca screen has 'Cuaca Hari Ini' header BEFORE 'Kondisi Saat Ini' section (correct order). User pill menu opens with menu-invite-button + logout-button. Register screen has all 3 role chips (warga/koord_rw/koord_kel).

issues: Pre-existing cosmetic console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'. No functional impact.

test_report_links: /app/backend/tests/test_siskamling_api.py (existing - updated 1 assertion to match new contract)
action_items: (Optional) Add testIDs to the 4 bottom-tab buttons in MainTabs.tsx (e.g., tab-darurat, tab-cuaca, tab-bencana, tab-chat) - currently tabs are reachable only by text() selector which is less robust for i18n.
(Optional) Add testIDs to the 6 RegisterScreen inputs (e.g., register-nama-input, register-email-input, etc.) - currently they have no testID and must be located by placeholder, which is fragile.
(Optional/non-blocking, carried from iteration 2) Replace deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow on web platform branches.
critical_code_review_comments: Role-based chat access control is correctly implemented in get_accessible_rooms() and enforced in both GET /chat/messages/{room_id} and POST /chat/messages with 403 on unauthorized rooms - verified via tests.
BMKG real API integration has a proper try/except with fallback mock data; httpx timeout 10s prevents long blocks.
All endpoints exclude MongoDB '_id' from responses (verified via assertions across multiple endpoints).
/api/emergency/alert now always returns 4 routing_info entries (incl. 'Lokasi GPS LIVE') regardless of mode - this is a contract change vs. iteration 1 expectations; updated test accordingly.
All interactive elements have testIDs EXCEPT MainTabs bottom tab buttons and RegisterScreen text inputs (see action_items).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_siskamling_api.py (1 assertion update for new routing_info contract)

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all critical flows (4-tab nav, role-based chat 1/2/3 rooms verified, members listing, BMKG earthquake card render, bencana grid, OSM iframes, report modal, weather order, invite menu)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_kepala_<random>@test.com (koordinator_kelurahan) and TEST_warga_<random>@test.com (warga), both kelurahan=Sukamaju, rw=07, rt=03. Multiple test users from pytest fixtures with TEST_ prefix. Sample chat message 'UI TEST msg 1' posted to room warga_rw_Sukamaju_07.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working end-to-end. Backend 33/33 tests pass. Frontend verified via real UI: 4 tabs work, role-based chat (warga sees only room-rw; koord_kel sees all 3: room-rw, room-koord_rw, room-koord_kel), chat send/receive renders in DOM, members listing + invite friend button visible, bencana page has BMKG earthquake card with real data + 6 status grid items + 2 OSM iframes + working report modal, weather screen has correct section order. KNOWN UI TEST QUIRK: RegisterScreen inputs lack testIDs and have duplicate 'Email'/'Password' placeholders due to LoginScreen leftovers in DOM; using backend API to seed users + UI login is the most reliable approach. Adding testIDs to RegisterScreen inputs and MainTabs tab buttons would improve testability.
rca_of_issue: N/A - no bugs found. The only intermediate failure during testing was 3 stale assertions in test_siskamling_api.py expecting routing_info length to vary by mode (3 for 'pergi'); the new server.py contract always returns 4 entries (warga RW + koord RW + koord kelurahan + GPS LIVE marker). Updated assertion to match the new contract. The transient USER MENU=False observation in one run was caused by insufficient wait after click; retest with 1500ms wait confirmed invite + logout buttons render correctly.
